name: create_subscription
description: Create a recurring subscription for an existing Mollie customer. The customer must have a valid mandate (verified payment method) first. Mollie will automatically charge the customer at the specified interval. Supports daily, weekly, monthly, and yearly billing cycles.

parameters.name: customerId
parameters.description: The ID of the customer to subscribe (path parameter, starts with 'cst_').

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: The recurring amount. Object with 'currency' (ISO 4217) and 'value' (string with decimals).

parameters.name: interval
parameters.description: The billing interval. Examples: '1 month', '2 weeks', '1 year', '14 days'.

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: A description for the subscription, shown on invoices.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: The start date of the subscription in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to today.

parameters.name: times
parameters.description: Total number of charges. Leave empty for unlimited recurring charges.

parameters.name: webhookUrl
parameters.description: URL to receive webhook notifications for each subscription payment.

parameters.name: metadata
parameters.description: Custom metadata to attach to the subscription.
